subcodes.first_line: O Mahdi! God willing, with divine vision thou shalt behold the world and whatsoever hath transpired therein in this Dispensation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهدی انشاء الله ببصر الهی در عالم و آنچه در او واقع شده ملاحظه نمائی در این ظهور
subcodes.subjects: @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @prophecy and fulfillment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
